mapper.sql: id, parent_id, menu_name, icon, order_num, path, component, perms, type, status, is_external, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu ORDER BY order_num ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu ( parent_id, menu_name, icon, order_num, path, component, perms, type, status, is_external, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{icon}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{perms}, #{type}, #{status}, #{isExternal}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role_menu WHERE menu_id = #{id}
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.icon, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.perms, m.type, m.status, m.is_external FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.type IN ('M', 'C') ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num ASC
SELECT id, perms FROM sys_menu WHERE perms = #{perms} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, path FROM sys_menu WHERE path = #{path} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, component FROM sys_menu WHERE component = #{component} LIMIT 1
